title: Find Polygon With the Largest Perimeter
titleCn: 找到最大周长的多边形

testcases.input: nums = [5,5,5] Output: 15 Explanation: The only possible polygon that can be made from nums has 3 sides: 5, 5, and 5. The perimeter is 5 + 5 + 5 = 15.
testcases.expectedOutput: 15 Explanation: The only possible polygon that can be made from nums has 3 sides: 5, 5, and 5. The perimeter is 5 + 5 + 5 = 15.

testcases.input: nums = [1,12,1,2,5,50,3] Output: 12 Explanation: The polygon with the largest perimeter which can be made from nums has 5 sides: 1, 1, 2, 3, and 5. The perimeter is 1 + 1 + 2 + 3 + 5 = 12. We cannot have a polygon with either 12 or 50 as the longest side because it is not possible to include 2 or more smaller sides that have a greater sum than either of them. It can be shown that the largest possible perimeter is 12.
testcases.expectedOutput: 12 Explanation: The polygon with the largest perimeter which can be made from nums has 5 sides: 1, 1, 2, 3, and 5. The perimeter is 1 + 1 + 2 + 3 + 5 = 12. We cannot have a polygon with either 12 or 50 as the longest side because it is not possible to include 2 or more smaller sides that have a greater sum than either of them. It can be shown that the largest possible perimeter is 12.

testcases.input: nums = [5,5,50] Output: -1 Explanation: There is no possible way to form a polygon from nums, as a polygon has at least 3 sides and 50 > 5 + 5.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: There is no possible way to form a polygon from nums, as a polygon has at least 3 sides and 50 > 5 + 5.
